channel.title: English on My Personal Blog
channel.description: Recent content in English on My Personal Blog

item.title: daily English words [2025-02-22 Sat]
item.description: a slim volume of verse UK is the abbreviation of the United Kingdom. everyone have to abide by the law I really appreciate his complete absorption in his work. The proposal boarders on the absurd. His words are in accord with his ideas. We should first try to acquaint ourselves with the facts. We should adhere our opinions. He had no warrant forhis suspicion. His house is adjacent to mine. We heard laughter in the adjoining room.

item.title: daily words [2025-02-23 Sun]
item.description: trying to mask her agitation An amateur shouldn’t play roulette for high stakes. He was appointed ambassador to the United States. ambient sounds of children in the background. He gave us an ambiguous answer. He is an ambitious businessman. Sound waves are measured by their amplitude. It is not always reliable to argue by analogy. anode is the positive electrode The Antarctic is the area around the South Pole. Extended the radio antenna.
